title: angelianthus humilis
intro: Angelianthus humilis, also known as Angelica, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its distinctive umbrella-like leaves and tall stems. The roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic qualities. The health benefits of Angelianthus humilis include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Angelianthus humilis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their effects.
